---
title: "Demo & Applications"
description: "Interactive projects and software applications"
---

Welcome to my project showcase. Here are some of the software applications and interactive tools I am currently developing. My work bridges the gap between rigorous statistical methodology and practical, data-driven application development.

<hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### TraffIQ
An innovative application designed to optimize and manage traffic-related flows. 

*(Tip: You can embed the English-language speech introducing the app, or insert a demonstration video/screenshots here.)*

<br>
<a href="#" style="color: #9E2A2B; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Explore TraffIQ &rarr;</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Melonu
A dedicated application focusing on efficient data handling and visualization.

*(Tip: Add specific details about the app's functionality, your tech stack, and links to the repository here.)*

<br>
<a href="#" style="color: #9E2A2B; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Explore Melonu &rarr;</a>
:::

:::

<hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;">

**Get in touch** if you are interested in collaborating or trying out these applications!

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 40px; margin-bottom: 40px;">
  <a class="btn-lux-black" href="https://github.com/zvkong" target="_blank" style="background-color: #1A1A1A; color: #F5F5F1; padding: 12px 30px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>&ensp;VIEW ALL ON GITHUB
  </a>
</div>
